title: Lost Sculk
description: Lost Sculk is an Infection based modpack using Sculk Horde as it's core.
body:
![Lost Sculk Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf9c55fefbd103b3cac73c006b3fbe73784006e.png)Lost Sculk uses the [Sculk Horde](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde) to build an intense and challenging infection playthrough.

This modpack offers various ways to fight back the Sculk. From standard melee, to fantastical magic.

Play through the quests to learn everything is pack has to offer and learn some of the custom lore and story we've built.

Explore exciting world gen using [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and various new structures to conquer

Play coop with friends using [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc). Simply start a LAN server and send them the link!
